calendar.matters: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.
Off Calendar Apr-27-2026 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Extending Time To Make Election Pursuant To Probate Code 13502 [Prob. C. 13502(B)]; Election By Surviving Spouse To Have Surviving Spouse'S Interest In Community And Separate Property Administered Pursuant To Terms Of Decedent'S Will
Off Calendar Mar-11-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nora Aponte-Woodring appeared via zoom for Frank Pohl (petitioner).

Ms. Aponte-Woodring stated that Estate is comprised of a portion of the decedent's community property and all of decedent's separate property, that the San Francsico property is 100% separate property interest, and that there is decedent's community property interest in cash and securities. And, that she will re-file a statement in a clarified manner.

The Court stated that the election described in Probate Code 13502 is extended to April 10, 2026. The matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-14-2026 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-17-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-09-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jun-12-2024 is admitted to probate. Frank Arnold Pohl is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. A Status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for Nov-17-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Lopez. Not Reported.
